# BP-42 negative: import alias is used repeatedly
lang: go
file: BP-42-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import jsonpkg "encoding/json"

func useAlias(data []byte) ([]byte, bool, error) {
	encoded, err := jsonpkg.Marshal(map[string]bool{"ok": jsonpkg.Valid(data)})
	return encoded, jsonpkg.Valid(data), err
}
